text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Question! Why is it that my bangs come together
so flawlessly?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
A. Because I'm a genius! B. To show off my
beautiful face! C. A blessing from above!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The correct answer is... ALL OF THE ABOVE! As a
consolation prize, I bless you with a smile from
ME!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Go ahead! Take it all in! BASK in the joy my face
brings!
